problem_statement: Connector descriptors and UAO refs exist, but the control plane lacks a schema-backed gate that blocks connector action promotion until live evidence, approval, secret-access, connector-worker execution, and rollback receipts exist.
success_criteria: ConnectorActionPromotionGate validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
ConnectorActionPromotionGate binds ConnectorDescriptor and ConnectorResult fixture evidence
ConnectorActionPromotionGate blocks live connector calls, secret access, runtime dispatch, deployment mutation, terminal closure, and success claims
ConnectorActionPromotionGate records required live evidence refs and blocked reason refs
ConnectorActionPromotionGate is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: promotion_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
live_connector_call_allowed remains false in the Foundation example
Phi_gov authorization remains absent until future evidence exists
operator approval remains absent until future evidence exists
secret access receipt remains absent until future evidence exists
connector worker execution receipt remains absent until future evidence exists
rollback recovery receipt remains absent until future evidence exists
